---
title: "TestProjekt 2"
type: "descriptive"
semester: "WS 22"
categories: ["Unternehmen", "Insolvenz"]
image: "image.png"
description: "Beispieltext Beipieltext Beispieltext."
listing:
  - id: top3
    contents: ["student_projects/*/*.qmd"]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: rank
    max-items: 3
  - id: rest
    contents: ["student_projects/*/*.qmd"]
    type: table
    sort: rank
    fields: [rank, title, authors_links]
    field-display-names:
      rank: "Rang"
      title: "Ausarbeitung"
      authors_links: "Autor:innen"
    exclude:
      filename: ["roter_affe.qmd", "pinker_panther.qmd", "lila_gürteltier.qmd"]
---
## Top 3 Ausarbeitungen

::: {#top3}
:::

## Weitere Ausarbeitungen

::: {#rest}
:::
